title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.46.1
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | patch | `v1.46.0` -> `v1.46.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage</summary>

### [`v1.46.1`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.46.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.46.0...v1.46.1)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.46.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1553](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1553)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230405 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1559](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1559)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.16.3 to 1.16.4 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1556](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1556)
-   Improve AtomicFileWriter's support for Win and Mac by [@​n1hility](https://togithub.com/n1hility) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1554](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1554)
-   "pull up" images when creating them, too by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1560](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1560)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​n1hility](https://togithub.com/n1hility) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1554](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1554)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.46.0...v1.46.1

</details>
